title: Anonymous Crypto Payments for Digital Products Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: You’ve spent months crafting an ebook, course, or template. It’s ready. But here’s the wall: PayPal and Stripe don’t work in Kenya. Even if they did, the fees would eat your profit. Crypto could solve this—but how? Most buyers don’t own crypto, and wallets are confusing. This is where Web3 Wallet Connect comes in. For $19.99, it bridges the gap. Buyers pay in USD via crypto (even if they’ve never used it), and you get paid without KYC, accounts, or borders. No more blocked payments. No more waiting. Just sell your digital product, anywhere.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Web3 Wallet Connect is a frontend tool that lets buyers purchase your digital products using crypto—without needing a crypto wallet. It generates multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds for 300+ coins. Why does this matter? Because it removes the biggest barrier to crypto payments: complexity. Your buyers don’t need to own crypto or understand it. They scan a QR code, pay in USD (converted to crypto at transaction time), and get instant access to your product. For you, it’s a way to collect payment globally, without KYC, fees, or geographic blocks. It’s not just a workaround—it’s a new system built for creators like you.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Here’s how it works: When a buyer clicks ‘Buy Now,’ Web3 Wallet Connect generates a QR code linked to the product’s price in USD. The code supports multiple blockchains (BTC, ETH, USDT, etc.), so buyers can choose their preferred coin. Behind the scenes, NOWPayments processes the transaction, converting the USD price to the selected coin’s live rate. Once payment is confirmed, the system automatically delivers your product—ebook, course, template—via a secure link. No manual intervention. No waiting. The tech handles payment verification, crypto conversion, and delivery in seconds. You get paid directly to your wallet, no middleman required.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This is for creators in Kenya, Nigeria, Ghana, and other restricted markets who sell digital products but can’t use PayPal or Stripe. It’s for solo developers building crypto-native stores. It’s for anyone tired of KYC, fees, and geographic blocks. Why? Because traditional payment systems exclude millions of creators. Crypto is borderless, but its complexity keeps it out of reach. Web3 Wallet Connect simplifies this. It’s not just a tool—it’s a way to reclaim your ability to sell globally. No subscriptions, no hidden fees. One-time payment, lifetime access. Built by creators, for creators.
Automated delivery means the download link arrives before the buyer navigates away from the payment confirmation page.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Three components power this system: 1. **Web3 Wallet Connect** ($19.99) handles the frontend—QR codes, live price feeds, and wallet integration. 2. **NOWPayments** processes transactions, supporting 300+ coins with no KYC. 3. **Automated Delivery** ensures your product is sent instantly once payment is verified. Together, they create a seamless flow: buyer pays, system confirms, product delivers. No accounts, no logins. Just a direct line from buyer to creator. The components are modular, so you can start with Wallet Connect and add others as needed. It’s a stack designed for flexibility and speed.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Start by purchasing Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) from https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html. Integrate it into your store using the deployment guide. Set your product prices in USD—the system handles crypto conversion. Test the flow with a small transaction. Once live, share your store link with your audience. Watch the payments come in, directly to your wallet. No more blocked transactions. No more waiting for approvals. Just sell, get paid, and focus on creating. This isn’t a temporary fix—it’s a new way to operate. Take the first step today.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

Web3 Wallet Connect is a frontend tool that lets buyers purchase your digital products using crypto, even if they’ve never used it before. It generates QR codes for 300+ coins, converts USD prices to crypto at transaction time, and ensures instant delivery of your product. You get paid directly to your wallet, with no KYC, fees, or geographic restrictions. It’s built for creators in restricted markets who can’t use PayPal or Stripe.
Every digital file type — ebooks, fonts, presets, plugins, templates — works with the same delivery pipeline.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you’re selling ebooks, courses, or templates, pairing Web3 Wallet Connect with the Core Shop Engine ($49.99) automates the entire process—from payment to delivery. For full control, add the Admin Dashboard ($29.99) to manage orders and track analytics. Each tool is modular, so you can start small and scale as needed. Together, they create a system that works anywhere, for anyone.
Your Action Checklist

Prepare your product files in delivery-ready format — PDF for ebooks, ZIP archives for multi-file products like font families or preset packs. Set your prices in USD and use NOWPayments to handle the crypto equivalent calculation automatically. Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your product list with file paths, prices, and delivery settings. Set up Web3 Wallet Connect with your product display and checkout configuration. Test the checkout flow in a browser on both desktop and mobile — confirm the QR code generates correctly and the payment amount displays accurately. Complete a real mainnet test transaction and confirm the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and verify the test transaction appears with correct details. Once the test passes, publish your store URL across your content channels. Review your first week of transactions in the Admin Dashboard to confirm everything is running correctly.
No platform middleman means no percentage cut, no payout delay, and no content policy that can delist your products.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
